_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: SCP:SL - Exiled
author: eggs@purpleflaghosting.com
description: Exiled Plugin Framework対応のSCP: Secret Laboratory Linux専用サーバー用Eggです - https://github.com/ExMod-Team/EXILED

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# steamcmd Base Installation Script
#
# Server Files: /mnt/server

## just in case someone removed the defaults.
if [ "${STEAM_USER}" == "" ]; then
    echo -e "steam user is not set.\n"
    echo -e "Using anonymous user.\n"
    STEAM_USER=anonymous
    STEAM_PASS=""
    STEAM_AUTH=""
else
    echo -e "user set to ${STEAM_USER}"
fi

## download and install steamcmd
cd /tmp
mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamcmd
curl -sSL -o steamcmd.tar.gz https://steamcdn-a.akamaihd.net/client/installer/steamcmd_linux.tar.gz
tar -xzvf steamcmd.tar.gz -C /mnt/server/steamcmd
cd /mnt/server/steamcmd

# SteamCMD fails otherwise for some reason, even running as root.
# This is changed at the end of the install process anyways.
chown -R root:root /mnt
export HOME=/mnt/server

## install game using steamcmd
./steamcmd.sh +force_install_dir /mnt/server +login ${STEAM_USER} ${STEAM_PASS} ${STEAM_AUTH} $( [[ "${WINDOWS_INSTALL}" == "1" ]] && printf %s '+@sSteamCmdForcePlatformType windows' ) +app_update ${SRCDS_APPID} $( [[ -z ${SRCDS_BETAID} ]] || printf %s "-beta ${SRCDS_BETAID}" ) $( [[ -z ${SRCDS_BETAPASS} ]] || printf %s "-betapassword ${SRCDS_BETAPASS}" ) ${INSTALL_FLAGS} validate +quit ## other flags may be needed depending on install. looking at you cs 1.6

## set up 32 bit libraries
mkdir -p /mnt/server/.steam/sdk32
cp -v linux32/steamclient.so ../.steam/sdk32/steamclient.so

## set up 64 bit libraries
mkdir -p /mnt/server/.steam/sdk64
cp -v linux64/steamclient.so ../.steam/sdk64/steamclient.so

mkdir -p $HOME/.config

# Download Exiled installer
curl -L -o /tmp/Exiled.Installer-Linux https://github.com/ExMod-Team/EXILED/releases/latest/download/Exiled.Installer-Linux 
chmod +x /tmp/Exiled.Installer-Linux


# Run Exiled installer
if [[ -n $EXILED_VERSION  ]] && [[ "${EXILED_VERSION}" != "latest" ]]; then
    echo "Installing Exiled version ${EXILED_VERSION}..."

    if [[ "${EXILED_PRE_RELEASES}" == "1" ]]; then
        echo "Including Exiled pre-releases"
    fi
else
    echo "Installing the latest Exiled version..."
    EXILED_VERSION=""
fi

# shellcheck disable=SC2046
/tmp/Exiled.Installer-Linux --path /mnt/server/ --appdata /mnt/server/.config --skip-version-select --exiled /mnt/server/.config $( [[ "${EXILED_PRE_RELEASES}" == "1" ]] && echo "--pre-releases " || echo "" )$( [[ -n "${EXILED_VERSION}" ]] && echo "--target-version ${EXILED_VERSION} " || echo "" )



echo "Installation complete."

variables.name: Exiledバージョン
variables.description: インストールするExiledのバージョンです。"latest" で最新リリースをインストールします。

variables.name: Exiledプレリリース
variables.description:
Exiledバージョンを latest にした場合、プレリリース版も対象にします。
特定バージョンを指定する場合は有効化不要です。

variables.name: SRCDS_APPID
variables.description: インストールに使用する Steam App ID です。

variables.name: ベータブランチ
variables.description: 指定した場合、Steamのベータブランチをインストールします。ブランチ切り替えには再インストールが必要です。
